title: Spicy Ethiopian Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish inspired by Ethiopian cuisine, made with yacon and a variety of spices.

ingredients.name: yacon
ingredients.amount: 1 medium yacon root, peeled and diced

ingredients.name: spiced oil
ingredients.notes: use a mixture of olive and sesame oil with added spices

instructions: Heat the spiced oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the diced yacon and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until it starts to caramelize.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Adjust seasoning and spice level to taste.
